params.name: format
params.description: Output format for the response

params.name: starttime
params.description: Limit results to events on or after this UTC date/time (ISO8601)

params.name: endtime
params.description: Limit results to events on or before this UTC date/time (ISO8601)

params.name: updatedafter
params.description: Limit results to events updated after this UTC date/time (ISO8601)

params.name: minlatitude
params.description: Limit to events south of this latitude (-90 to 90)

params.name: maxlatitude
params.description: Limit to events north of this latitude (-90 to 90)

params.name: minlongitude
params.description: Limit to events east of this longitude (-360 to 360)

params.name: maxlongitude
params.description: Limit to events west of this longitude (-360 to 360)

params.name: latitude
params.description: Latitude for circle search center (requires longitude and maxradius)

params.name: longitude
params.description: Longitude for circle search center (requires latitude and maxradius)

params.name: maxradius
params.description: Maximum radius in degrees for circle search

params.name: maxradiuskm
params.description: Maximum radius in kilometers for circle search

params.name: minmagnitude
params.description: Limit to events with magnitude larger than this value

params.name: maxmagnitude
params.description: Limit to events with magnitude smaller than this value

params.name: mindepth
params.description: Limit to events with depth more than this value in km

params.name: maxdepth
params.description: Limit to events with depth less than this value in km

params.name: eventtype
params.description: Limit to events of a specific type (e.g., earthquake, explosion)

params.name: limit
params.description: Maximum number of events to return (1-20000)

params.name: offset
params.description: Return results starting at this offset (for pagination)

params.name: orderby
params.description: Order results by field

params.name: catalog
params.description: Specify a specific earthquake catalog to query

params.name: contributor
params.description: Limit to events contributed by a specific contributor

params.name: eventid
params.description: Select a specific event by event ID

params.name: includeallmagnitudes
params.description: Include all available magnitudes for events

params.name: includeallorigins
params.description: Include all available origins for events

params.name: includedeleted
params.description: Include deleted events

params.name: includesuperseded
params.description: Include superseded events

params.name: reviewstatus
params.description: Limit to events with a specific review status

items.docs: Submit a query to the USGS earthquake catalog using various filter parameters. Returns earthquake events matching the specified criteria in the requested format. Defaults to events from the past 30 days if no time range is specified.

params.name: format
params.description: Output format

params.name: starttime
params.description: Limit results to events on or after this date/time (ISO8601)

params.name: endtime
params.description: Limit results to events on or before this date/time (ISO8601)

params.name: minlatitude
params.description: Minimum latitude boundary

params.name: maxlatitude
params.description: Maximum latitude boundary

params.name: minlongitude
params.description: Minimum longitude boundary

params.name: maxlongitude
params.description: Maximum longitude boundary

params.name: minmagnitude
params.description: Minimum magnitude filter

params.name: maxmagnitude
params.description: Maximum magnitude filter

items.docs: Returns the number of earthquakes matching the specified query parameters without returning the full event data. Accepts the same parameters as the query endpoint.
Returns a list of available earthquake catalogs that can be queried.
Returns a list of available data contributors to the earthquake catalog.
Returns the full version number of the earthquake catalog web service.
